narrative:
Newton Twp B (precinct in Trumbull County) has 724 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.4 percentage points.
